summary: Mixed sentiment; solid performance highlighted by a fiery Scarlet Begonias ending, but recording details are unclear.
review: Fans who rated the show highly describe it as a solid set with Jerry’s guitar blazing on the closing section of Scarlet Begonias. No reviewer mentions the source or clarity of the audio, and one outlier gave a zero‑star rating, resulting in an overall mixed impression.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews praise the show and Jerry’s playing, while a single 0‑star review drags the average down; lack of recording details limits certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard vs. audience sources, clarity, or mix issues, leaving the technical quality indeterminate.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a solid, enjoyable show with particular praise for the ending of Scarlet Begonias.

band_member_comments.Jerry: MIDI Jerry at the end of Scarlet is on fire – praised for his blazing guitar work.
